counterClaimFeeCostParagraph: Based on the information provided, it will cost the defendant {{counterClaimFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} to make their counterclaim.
counterClaimFeeHelpParagraph: The defendant may be able to get help paying the fee if they (one or more of the following):
counterClaimFeeHeading2: Does the defendant need help paying the counterclaim fee?

counterClaimFeeOptions.iNeedHelpWithPayingFee: The defendant needs help paying the fee
counterClaimFeeOptions.iDoNotNeedHelpWithPayingFee: The defendant does not need help paying the fee

counterClaimFee.required: Select if the defendant needs help paying the counterclaim fee
